## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make docs`

## Hardware safety

- [ ] This change does not add firmware flashing, unknown commands, command scanning, or unreviewed physical writes.
- [ ] Hardware evidence and capability guards are documented when protocol behavior changes.
- [ ] No vendor binaries, serial numbers, private profiles, or host-specific logs are included.
